---
title: "Building a Computer"
---

- [Introduction](01%20Introduction/)

- [Signed Integer Encodings](02%20Signed%20Numbers/)

- [Character Encodings](03%20Characters/)

- [Floating Point Number Encodings](04%20Floating%20Point%20Numbers/)

- [Decoders and Encoders](05%20Decoders%20and%20Encoders/)

- [Multiplexers and Demultiplexers](06%20Multiplexers%20and%20Demultiplexers/)

- [Flip Flops](07%20Flip%20Flops/)

- [A Simple Computer](08%20A%20Simple%20Computer/)

- [Practice](99%20Practice/)
